targets.notes: Public commitment to achieve net-zero greenhouse gas emissions across operations and value chain by 2030, including Scopes 1, 2, and 3.
targets.title: Net-zero greenhouse gas emissions across operations and value chain by 2030

targets.boundary: Global Google data centers and office campuses
targets.notes: Goal to operate all data centers and office campuses on 24/7 carbon-free energy by 2030, matching electricity demand with carbon-free sources on an hourly basis.
targets.title: 24/7 carbon-free energy for data centers and offices by 2030
targets.unit: % of electricity demand for data centers and offices met with carbon-free energy on an hourly basis
